description: Use this API to return starting array indices and status of CCT Miscellaneous other models. This API routine was first introduced in release 33.9.0. ierr, ival = cctmind_msco(mins, string)

parameters.name: mins
parameters.description: Model instance number of the model. (input).

parameters.name: string
parameters.description: String indicating the model quantity desired. (input).

string.description: NCON Number of CON values used by the model.
NSTATE Number of STATE values used by the model.
NVAR Number of VAR values used by the model.
NICON Number of ICON values used by the model.
STATUS Bypassed flag: 0 = bypassed; 1 = not bypassed.

error_codes.description: No model attached for the specified MINS; ‘IVAL’ unchanged.
Model does not use any of this data type; ‘IVAL’ = 0 returned.
Dynamics data not present in working memory; ‘IVAL’ unchanged.
